March 31 – April 3, 2026  ·  Los Angeles, California

Sarah's
Forty
& Fabulous

A Malibu Barbie birthday, perfectly curated

Just show up  ·  everything else is handled

The plan

“Life begins at forty — and so does the best version of everything.”

This one’s for you, Sarah

The Itinerary

01
Tuesday, March 31
Touch down, glow up, shop around
10:15a
DL0501 Departs ✈
Wheels up. Sarah’s birthday trip officially begins.
Travel
12:20p
Arrive LAX
Sunglasses on, windows down. California air hits different.
Arrive
1:00p
Pick Up the Car
Keys in hand, heading to the coast.
1:30p
Settle into the Airbnb
The fridge is stocked, the space is ready. Sarah just needs to walk in and exhale.
Home Base
2:00p
Shopping Day — The Route
Platform (Culver City) → The Dig (Abbot Kinney) → DOEN (Brentwood Country Mart) → Favorite Daughter (Beverly Hills). Three and a half hours of pure joy, curated for Sarah’s exact taste.
Shopping
5:45p
Élephante ↗
Rooftop Italian above Santa Monica with ocean views. Reservations are made, the table is waiting. Vodka pasta, whipped eggplant, golden hour light. ★ 4.3
Dinner
02
Wednesday, April 1
Shop it, picnic it, dine it
Morning
Breakfast at Home
A slow, beautiful morning. The groceries are already in. Coffee, good light, Sarah’s call on everything else. The robe-and-towel era is officially open.
Home Morning
10:00a
Shopping — Abbot Kinney
The Dig — vintage jeans and cool-girl pieces, right on Abbot Kinney.

Ozma — slow luxury in conscious fabrics, open noon–5pm. Timed perfectly.

Wander the rest of Abbot Kinney — iced coffee, pop-in shops, all of it.
Shopping
1:00p
Home to Refresh + Pack the Picnic
Head home, pack up, and head to a picture-perfect picnic on the beach.
2:00p
🥊 The Birthday Beach Picnic
Blanket on Venice Beach. Champagne, a full cheese board, grapes, music, afternoon light. Three glorious hours of doing absolutely nothing on purpose. Except taking photos of course.
Photo MomentChampagne Picnic
5:30p
Back Home to Get Ready
Golden hour has done its thing. Time for the golden girls to get ready.
Getting Ready
7:15p
Gjelina — Dinner ↗
A Venice institution since 2008. Brick floors, candlelight, garden patio. Reservations locked in. Japanese sweet potato, lamb pizza, warm date cake with ginger ice cream. ★ 4.2
Dinner
03
Thursday, April 2
Sarah’s shoot day. Her moment.
Morning
Free Morning — Sarah’s Call
Pilates, a long beach walk, a solo café sit — whatever Sarah wants before the main event.
Free Time
3:00p
📷 Private Shoot with Garrett Lobaugh ↗
This is the gift. A private, four-hour golden hour session with Garrett Lobaugh — one of LA’s most talented photographers, based in Santa Monica and known for his stunning portraiture work. As a photographer herself, Sarah will feel completely at ease in front of Garrett’s lens. Multiple looks, multiple locations — Venice Beach, Abbot Kinney, wherever the light leads. Golden hour hits ~7:15pm and Garrett will chase every last ray of it. These photos will be some of the best she’s ever had taken.
Private Shoot
7:30p
Soho House West Hollywood ↗
Members-only rooftop with panoramic LA views behind glass. Good wine, great company, the city glowing below. ★ 4.6
EveningThe Moment
04
Friday, April 3
One last golden morning, then home
Morning
Farewell Brunch
The Butcher’s Daughter on Abbot Kinney (plant-forward, stunning interior), Fig Tree Café right on the Venice Beach boardwalk (ocean views, coconut pancakes), or Great White for a beautiful California classic.
Brunch
~11:00a
Head to LAX
Car drop-off is handled. Allow 1.5 hrs on a Friday. One last iced coffee, one last breath of California air.
Travel
2:35p
DL0395 Departs ✈
Homeward bound. Sunkissed, shopped out, photographed beautifully, absolutely thriving.
Travel

The Shopping Edit

Our top spots

Platform
Culver City · Washington Blvd
Mon–Sun 7am–10pm
Architecturally stunning open-air market. First stop Tuesday — sets the tone for the whole trip.
The Dig
Venice · Abbot Kinney Blvd
Mon–Thu 10am–6pm  ·  Fri–Sun 10am–7pm
Curated vintage jeans and cool-girl pieces. Right on the best street in LA. Sarah’s vintage denim list was made for this place.
Ozma
Atwater Village · Knox Ave (Wed–Sat only)
Wed–Sat 12pm–5pm  ·  Closed Sun–Tue
Slow luxury in beautiful, conscious fabrics. Open Wed noon–5pm — timed perfectly for Wednesday morning.
DÔEN
Santa Monica · Brentwood Country Mart
Mon–Sat 10am–6pm  ·  Sun 11am–5pm
Romantic, heirloom-quality pieces. The lace shorts, the slip skirt, the throw-on dresses. This is Sarah’s store.
Favorite Daughter
Beverly Hills · N Beverly Dr
Mon–Sat 10am–6pm  ·  Sun 12pm–5pm
Design-forward, elevated basics. The sexy go-to outfit lives here. The store itself is a whole moment.
Guild
Venice · Abbot Kinney + Platform
Mon–Sat 11am–7pm  ·  Sun 11am–6pm
Women’s boutique with two LA locations — one right on Abbot Kinney, one at Platform. Beautiful, effortless California pieces.
Skylark
Venice · Abbot Kinney Blvd
Mon–Sat 11am–7pm  ·  Sun 11am–6pm
Feminine, fashion-forward boutique with a distinctive edge. One of the most-loved stops on the strip for a reason.
Whimsy + Row
Abbot Kinney · Venice
Mon–Sat 11am–7pm  ·  Sun 12pm–6pm
Sustainably made women’s essentials with a breezy LA spirit. Easy, beautiful, completely Sarah’s vibe.
★

The Champagne Picnic

The centerpiece of Wednesday afternoon on Venice Beach. Everything is sorted — Sarah just needs to show up, sit down, and let it all happen.

  • Beautiful linen blankets — packed and ready
  • Champagne & rosé — chilled and waiting
  • Full cheese board: brie, manchego, something funky
  • Grapes, figs, honeycomb
  • Charcuterie, crackers, cornichons
  • Dark chocolate
  • Fresh flowers for the spread
  • Playlist queued and ready
  • Film camera for the candids
  • Sunscreen — obviously
  • Sparkling water & her favorite iced coffee
  • A birthday candle, because of course

Wednesday, April 1  ·  Venice Beach, 2pm

Sarah’s LA

The best of the best

Restaurants & Dinners
Élephante ↗
Santa Monica · Rooftop Italian
Rooftop ocean views, vodka pasta, golden hour light through the windows. Sarah’s Tuesday night — already booked.
Gjelina ↗
Venice · Abbot Kinney
The Venice institution. Candlelit, gorgeous, garden patio. Lamb pizza, Japanese sweet potato, date cake. Wednesday dinner — reserved.
Gjusta ↗
Venice · Bakery & Deli
Gjelina’s legendary sister spot. An incredible bakery, deli and café — perfect for a morning coffee run or grabbing picnic supplies.
Soho House WeHo ↗
West Hollywood · Rooftop
Members-only panoramic rooftop. Thursday evening — the perfect way to close out Sarah’s birthday night.
Brunch & Coffee
Great White ↗
Venice · Pacific Ave
Boho, locally-sourced California brunch. The almond cortado and breakfast burrito are non-negotiable. ★ 4.5
The Butcher’s Daughter ↗
Venice · Abbot Kinney
Plant-forward, stunning interior, very Sarah. The vegan lemon waffles will ruin all other waffles. ★ 4.4
Fig Tree Café ↗
Venice · Ocean Front Walk
Right on the Venice Beach boardwalk with ocean views. Coconut pancakes, fresh juice, the vibe is perfect for a last morning. ★ 4.3
Menotti’s Coffee Stop ↗
Venice · Abbot Kinney
The beloved neighborhood coffee spot on Abbot Kinney. Small, perfect, exactly the kind of place Sarah will want to find on a morning walk.
Bars & Evening Drinks
Élephante Bar ↗
Santa Monica · Rooftop
The rooftop bar above the restaurant is as good as the restaurant itself. Cocktails with a view — stay after dinner or come just for drinks.
Townehouse ↗
Venice · Windward Ave
Venice’s oldest bar. Dive-bar cozy, deeply local, and the kind of place that feels genuinely LA in the best way.
Ciélo ↗
Venice · Abbot Kinney
Wine bar with a beautiful, intimate atmosphere on Abbot Kinney. Natural wines, small plates, low-key gorgeous. Perfect for a Tuesday nightcap.
The Abbot’s Habit ↗
Venice · Abbot Kinney
Cozy neighborhood wine bar and café right on the strip. Good wine, good company, completely Sarah’s pace.

Just So You Know, Sarah

Everything is already done

🏠
The Airbnb
Booked and beautiful. We’ll order groceries ahead of time to save every second for the fun — Sarah walks in and it’s already home.
🚗
Getting Around
The car is reserved and ready at LAX. Sarah just needs to pick it up. Venice, Santa Monica, Culver City — all within easy reach.
🍴
Every Dinner
Élephante on Tuesday, Gjelina on Wednesday — both reserved. Thursday’s Soho House evening is confirmed. Friday brunch is chosen and waiting.
📷
The Photoshoot
Garrett Lobaugh is booked for Thursday afternoon. Four hours, golden hour, private session. Sarah just shows up and looks incredible — which we know she will.
🍾
The Picnic
Blanket, champagne, cheese board, flowers. People will want to be us.
🌹
The Only Rule
Sarah does not plan, organize, or stress about a single thing this trip. That’s already been done. She just shows up and lets it be the birthday she deserves.

Happy 40th, Sarah.

You were always the main character  ·  this is just the proof
